nasb.text: And there came a voice from above the expanse that was over their heads; whenever they stood still, they dropped their wings.

esv.text: And there came a voice from above the expanse over their heads. When they stood still, they let down their wings.

cnv.text: 有聲音從牠們頭頂上面的穹蒼發出來；牠們站著不動的時候，翅膀就垂下來。

ccb.text: 他们站立垂下翅膀时，有声音从他们头顶的穹苍之上传来。
